feedback.text: I believe this initiative would be greatly served by extending it's coverage to also cover digitally owned video games already purchased. Surely there should be no question that once a product is purchased, none should be allowed to take it from you. All services you pay to access need clear terms before point of purchase, (Not hidden in a prohibitally verbose and long EULA). Making clear that you have not purchased a product to own but a license with a expiration date. I thank the EU commission for their consideration on this matter.
